prompt: Add PagerDuty incident creation for critical alerts

turns.content:
<task>
When a critical alert fires, create an incident in PagerDuty to page the on-call engineer.
</task>

arguments.query: PagerDuty Events API v2 trigger incident Python

turns.content:
1. PagerDuty Events API v2 - https://developer.pagerduty.com/docs/events-api-v2/trigger-events/
   POST https://events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue with routing_key, event_action, payload.

arguments.title: PagerDuty Events API v2

turns.content: Finding recorded: PagerDuty Events API v2

arguments.message: PagerDuty integration is ready. trigger_incident() creates an alert, resolve_incident() clears it using the same dedup_key. Set PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY env var to the integration key from your PagerDuty service settings.

arguments.summary: Created PagerDuty service with trigger and resolve incident methods using Events API v2. Supports dedup_key for incident correlation.
arguments.final_answer: PagerDuty integration created. trigger_incident() fires alerts with configurable severity. resolve_incident() clears them via dedup_key. Gracefully skips if PAGERDUTY_ROUTING_KEY not set.
